summary: Tested Players Panel and GlobalPlayerPopup features (iteration 28). All features working correctly. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements and flows working.

issues: Console shows 'Failed to load resource: status 400' - appears to be avatar/resource loading, non-blocking
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended
Console warning: DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for screen reader users

critical_code_review_comments: Players icon (data-testid='online-users-btn') in navbar opens panel showing all players (online/offline)
Clicking player in Players panel opens profile with stats (Films, Revenue, Quality, XP, Awards, Level, Fame)
Profile view shows Add Friend/Remove Friend button based on friendship status
ClickableNickname component in leaderboard works - clicking nickname opens GlobalPlayerPopup
GlobalPlayerPopup shows: Add Friend button, 1v1 Challenge button, Message button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Players popup and GlobalPlayerPopup features fully tested and working. Players panel opens from navbar icon showing online/offline players. Clicking any player name (in leaderboard or panels) opens GlobalPlayerPopup with stats, films, and action buttons (Add Friend, 1v1 Challenge, Message). All navigation buttons work correctly.

features_tested.GET /api/users/all-players: PASSED - Returns list of all players with online status
features_tested.GET /api/users/{id}/full-profile: PASSED - Returns complete profile with stats, films, is_online, is_own_profile
features_tested.POST /api/friends/request: PASSED - Sends friend request with user_id field
features_tested.Players icon in navbar: PASSED - data-testid='online-users-btn' visible and opens dialog
features_tested.Players panel: PASSED - Shows ONLINE and OFFLINE sections with all players
features_tested.Player profile in panel: PASSED - Shows avatar, nickname, stats, action buttons
features_tested.GlobalPlayerPopup - Stats: PASSED - Shows Films, Revenue, Quality, XP, Awards, Level
features_tested.GlobalPlayerPopup - Recent Films: PASSED - Shows film posters with title, genre, quality, revenue
